ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the publisher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the publisher */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the publisher */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the publisher */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the publisher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the publisher was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the publisher was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "isbn" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the book (ISBN) */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "book_author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "year_of_publication" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "image_url_s" TEXT /* URL for the small image of the book */,
  "image_url_m" TEXT /* URL for the medium image of the book */,
  "image_url_l" TEXT /* URL for the large image of the book */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book in stock */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the book */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the book was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the book was last updated */,
  "imported_by" TEXT /* User who imported the book into the system */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "translator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the translator of the book */,
  "illustrator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the illustrator of the book */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the editor of the book */,
  "book_format" TEXT /* Format of the book */,
  "number_of_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the book */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the book */,
  "edition_number" INTEGER /* Edition number of the book */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isbn"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_translator_id FOREIGN KEY ("translator_id") REFERENCES translators ("translator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_illustrator_id FOREIGN KEY ("illustrator_id") REFERENCES illustrators ("illustrator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translators" (
  "translator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the translator */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the translator */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the translator */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the translator */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the translator */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the translator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the translator was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the translator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "illustrators" (
  "illustrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the illustrator */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the illustrator */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the illustrator */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the illustrator */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the illustrator */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the illustrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the illustrator was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the illustrator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("illustrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editors" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the editor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the editor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the editor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the editor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the editor */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the editor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the editor was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the editor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id")
)
